# Relocation IL

> Relocation IL מספקת ייעוץ מקצועי לישראלים המעוניינים להגר לניו זילנד ואוסטרליה דרך מסלול לימודים אקדמיים. תואר שני → ויזת עבודה → תושבות קבועה → אזרחות.

Relocation IL is a professional immigration consulting service for Israelis seeking to relocate to New Zealand and Australia through academic study pathways. The proven route: Master's degree → Post-study work visa → Permanent residency → Citizenship.

## Main Pages

- [Homepage](https://relocationil.com/): Landing page with overview of the study-to-citizenship pathway for NZ and Australia
- [New Zealand](https://relocationil.com/new-zealand): Complete guide to immigration to New Zealand through studies — top universities, Green List occupations, work visas, and pathway to residency
- [Australia](https://relocationil.com/australia): Complete guide to immigration to Australia through studies — top universities, skills assessment, points system, and pathway to PR
- [Compare NZ vs AU](https://relocationil.com/compare): Side-by-side comparison of New Zealand and Australia — tuition costs, salaries, visa timelines, quality of life, climate, and residency paths
- [Process](https://relocationil.com/process): Step-by-step guide to the relocation process — from initial consultation to citizenship, with timelines
- [FAQ](https://relocationil.com/faq): 23 frequently asked questions covering costs, visas, family, employment, timeline, and more
- [Contact](https://relocationil.com/contact): Contact form, phone, email, and WhatsApp for free consultation

## Key Information

### Target Audience
Israeli families and professionals seeking a proven immigration pathway through higher education in New Zealand or Australia.

### Services
- Immigration pathway consulting (NZ & AU)
- University selection and application guidance
- Visa and work permit guidance
- Settlement and family relocation support
- Free 15-minute initial consultation

### Key Facts
- New Zealand: Visa processing in 4-8 weeks, Green List fast-track to PR for in-demand occupations
- Australia: Average salary AUD 95K+, strong demand for skilled migrants
- Both countries: Spouse can work from day 1, children study for free in public schools
- Canada comparison: 18+ months visa wait vs. NZ/AU faster processing

### Contact
- Website: https://relocationil.com
- WhatsApp: Available on website
- Free consultation: 15-minute call
